use_cases: Reusable button component with multiple style variants for different actions
Supports destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, and link button styles
Accessible button with focus-visible ring states and disabled handling
Size variants for compact, default, large, and icon-only buttons
Can render as child component using Radix Slot for composition
ai_summary: A reusable button component built with Radix UI Slot and class-variance-authority, offering multiple visual variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes. Uses Tailwind CSS for styling with standard focus-visible rings and hover states. Fully typed with React forwardRef for accessibility and composition patterns.
